name: RED METAL RESOURCES, LTD.
summary: Item 1 of this Annual Report for a detailed description of our unproved mineral assets and associated exploration campaigns. Currently, we have two employees in Chile and engage part time assistants during our exploration programs and for administrative support. Most of our support - such as vehicles, office and equipment - is supplied under short-term contracts. The only long-term commitments that we have are for royalty payments on four of our mineral concessions - Farellón, Quina, Exet...
